title: Add electron-updater dependency and GitHub publish block to electron-builder.json
description: Pure additive change to package.json + electron-builder.json. See '## External Docs Pinned (electron-updater)' in context.md for the exact publish block. Library version is electron-updater@^6.3.x (CJS-only; ships its own types — no @types/* needed).
acceptance_criteria: npm install completes successfully and updates package-lock.json
node_modules/electron-updater exists with package.json and dist/ folder
electron-builder.json contains a top-level "publish" object with provider=github, owner=mateojacques, repo=propiedades-el-31-facturacion, releaseType=release
electron-builder.json remains valid JSON (jq . electron-builder.json succeeds)
No other dependencies added or removed; no version bumps to existing packages
